name: M:GTA.World.DrawBoxForAngledArea(GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Math.Vector3,System.Single,System.Drawing.Color,GTA.DrawBoxFlags)
summary:
Draws a box that occupies the angled area.
            An angled area is an X-Z oriented rectangle with three parameters: origin, extent, and width.

params.name: originEdge
params.description: The mid-point along a base edge of the rectangle.

params.name: extentEdge
params.description: The mid-point of opposite base edge on the other Z.

params.name: width
params.description: The length of the base edge.
